title: xylocarpus moluccensis
intro: Xylocarpus moluccensis, also known as the Bato or Moluccan mangrove, is a plant species in the family Meliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as having antioxidant and antiparasitic properties. Xylocarpus moluccensis is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder for its herbal remedies.
